_readme: Copy this file to pipeline_config.json and fill in your values. Never commit pipeline_config.json.

server._ip_note: IP or hostname of your vLLM / Ollama / OpenAI-compatible server
server._port_note: Use 8000 for vLLM default, 11434 for Ollama, 443 for OpenAI

task._note: O*NET tasks processed per LLM round-trip. Reduce if you hit context limits.

max_tokens._note: Reduce if your model has a smaller context window or you hit OOM errors.

timeouts._note: Increase api_request_seconds for slower servers or larger models.

delays._note: Throttle to avoid overwhelming the server. Set to 0 if your server can handle the load.
